requests.response_body:
Skip to main content

Your bins

Home

Please use this page to select one of the following:

View my collections

Check your bin day.

View request history

Check the status of previous requests.

Request bulky collection

This is a chargeable service, and all charges are non refundable.

Request an additional or replace a missing bin

Recycling and refuse only.

Request larger, smaller bins or replace a damaged bin

Recycling and refuse only.

Replacement Food Caddies, Liners and Plastic Sacks

We only supply plastic sacks to properties who do not have a wheelie bin.

Missed collection

We cannot return for missed food waste, textiles or small electricals.

Missed assisted collection

An assisted collection is agreed with the council.

Request removal of an unwanted bin at my property

We will only remove bins that belong to Norwich City Council.

Request removal of an unwanted bin on the street

We will only remove bins that belong to Norwich City Council.

Mess left after collection

Report spillages caused by the collection crew.

result.icb: NHS Norfolk and Waveney Integrated Care Board
result.ruc21: Urban: Nearer to a major town or city
